instruction: Share your review of a newly opened coffee shop in your area. Your response must contain exactly 150 words. Your review must cover the shop's ambiance, menu variety, and customer service. Begin your review with the phrase "Stepping into this coffee shop," and conclude with the phrase "a delightful addition to the neighborhood." Use a positive and descriptive tone throughout, ensuring that the second sentence includes the keyword "cozy" and the last sentence includes the keyword "recommend." Additionally, capitalize the name of the coffee shop and ensure all other words are in lowercase. Write the review entirely in uppercase.
response: STEPPING INTO THIS COFFEE SHOP, I WAS IMMEDIATELY WRAPPED IN A WARM, INVITING ATMOSPHERE THAT FELT TRULY COZY FROM THE MOMENT I ENTERED. THE INTERIOR DESIGN FEATURES RUSTIC WOOD AND SOFT LIGHTING, MAKING IT PERFECT FOR EITHER A QUICK MEET OR A LONG WORK SESSION. THE MENU OFFERS A FASCINATING VARIETY OF OPTIONS, RANGING FROM ARTISAN LATTES TO EXOTIC TEA BLEND AND HEALTHY BREAKFAST BOWLS. EVERY ITEM SEEMS CAREFULLY CURATED TO SATISFY EVERY PALATE IN THE COMMUNITY. THE BARISTAS WERE EXCEPTIONALLY FRIENDLY, SMILING CONSTANTLY AND TAKING THE TIME TO EXPLAIN THEIR SPECIALTY BEANS WITH PASSION AND KNOWLEDGE. THEIR ATTENTION TO DETAIL WAS APPRECIATED BY EVERY SINGLE CUSTOMER WHO PASSED THROUGH THE DOORS. THE CLEANLINESS WAS IMPECCABLE, AND THE MUSIC PLAYED AT JUST THE RIGHT VOLUME TO KEEP THE ENERGY HIGH WITHOUT BEING OVERWHELMING. I HIGHLY RECOMMEND THIS PLACE TO ANYONE LOOKING FOR A GREAT SPOT TO RELAX AND ENJOY A GOOD CUP OF COFFEE. IT IS DEFINITELY A DELIGHTFUL ADDITION TO THE NEIGHBORHOOD.

Conflicts between Format Constraints.new_constraint: Write the review entirely in uppercase.
Conflicts between Format Constraints.org_constraint: Capitalize the name of the coffee shop and ensure all other words are in lowercase.
